subject: New Request: Go Developer – Gaming
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from FrostByte Games, a company in the gaming space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Go Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• Go
• GCP
• Kubernetes
• MongoDB

Practical details:
• Start: 2022-06-08
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
David Karlsson
Head of Staffing
Agile Minds
Tel: +46 70 890 12 34
